posts.author: Teresa.DevSamurai (Teresa Tran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting News! TeamBoard for monday.com V5.3.2 is here!

What’s New?

  • Global mapping fields

In order to enhance certain functionalities such as reports and dashboards, it is essential to establish global mapping fields. This setting will streamline the mapping process within Teamboard, making it more efficient and easier to use.

You can now map fields globally across monday.com . This means data can sync more easily from monday.com to your projects, making it simpler to manage and keep everything consistent.

Opens image in full screenOpen

https://docs.devsamurai.com/__attachments/2234843139/Global%20mapping%20fields.gif?inst-v=da7581db-317d-4dfa-a602-e0285c4a3568(image larger than 10 MB)

Select Time Range for Holidays

You can now choose a specific time range for holidays. This helps with accurate planning and time tracking, taking into account different holiday schedules.

Opens image in full screenOpen

https://docs.devsamurai.com/__attachments/2234843139/Select%20Time%20Range%20for%20Holidays.gif?inst-v=da7581db-317d-4dfa-a602-e0285c4a3568(image larger than 10 MB)

Re-arrange Tasks by Drag/Drop

You can now re-arrange tasks by simply dragging and dropping them. This makes it easier to organize tasks based on your priorities and adjust to changes quickly.

Opens image in full screenOpen

Improvements

  • Performance Enhancements

Help Center

If you’re enjoying our app, we’d appreciate it if you could leave us a review. However, if you are experiencing any troubles, please contact us via the support portal before submitting a review. We are committed to working carefully and quickly to resolve any issues you may have.

Your feedback is valuable and appreciated!

#TeamBoard #ResourcePlanning timetracking #NewRelease #mondaydotcom
